calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: scaffolded_sd054 FULL curriculum readiness, CORRECTED G0: developmental positive-control floor (>0.3) for Stage-0 z_goal; G3 ecological gate kept strict at 0.4 (successor to 603m)
items.note: Substrate-readiness diagnostic (claim_ids=[]). 603m FAILed the readiness gate at G0 ONLY (Stage-0 nursery z_goal>0.4 held 1/3: 0.477/0.389/0.371) while the three load-bearing legs PASSed (P1 survival 3/3, P2 contact 3/3, P2 ecological consumption-gated z_goal 2/3) with both non-vacuity preconditions met (harm_eval range 0.075, reached-P2-alive 3/3). Per failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-603m_2026-06-10 (user-confirmed re-queue, 'retime don't loosen'): z_goal magnitude scales with substrate maturity; for EVERY seed ecological P2 z_goal EXCEEDS the pre-warmup Stage-0 nursery z_goal, so the mature 0.4 magnitude under-reads the least-mature stage (the INVERSE of a substrate-ceiling fingerprint). 603n recalibrates ONLY G0 to a developmentally-appropriate >0.3 positive-control floor (zero-init pre-feed baseline -> materially-above-baseline lift), keeping the load-bearing ecological G3 STRICT at 0.4 and G1/G2 unchanged. Effectively a confirmation run. PASS=G0 AND G1 AND G2 AND G3 (each >=2/3) -> next session flips scaffolded_sd054_onboarding ready=True + re-issues SD-049 Phase-2 behavioural validation (V3-EXQ-514l successor, MECH-229/230) closing goal_pipeline:GAP-2. Non-vacuity: harm-pathway-discriminative AND reached-P2-alive, else substrate_not_ready_requeue.

items.title: InfantCurriculum Phase 0->1 reachability with exploration-diversity stack armed (591b seed-46 collapse re-test)
items.note: Diagnose-first follow-up to failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-591b_2026-06-10. Same Phase 0->1 reachability run as 591b (5 seeds 42-46, 160 ep, 200 steps/ep, landed H_POS_FRAC_OF_MAX=0.20 gate) with the exploration-diversity stack ARMED: MECH-313 noise floor (use_noise_floor=True) + MECH-314 structured curiosity (use_structured_curiosity=True) at landed default magnitudes; SP-CEM already main-path default. 591b ran SP-CEM-on but those two masters OFF; seed 46 collapsed to a near-stationary policy (h_pos_mean=0.0375) and never cleared the single-episode gate. claim_ids=[] diagnostic. PASS (all 5 reach Phase 1 + advanced seeds genuinely explored) -> diversity stack resolves the collapse, gate needs NO change. FAIL (collapse persists) -> routes to the gate-robustness work the autopsy deferred (K-of-N / EMA crossing or active Phase-0 exploration shaping), NEVER to lowering the threshold. Non-vacuity guard: advanced seeds must show genuine exploration (h_pos_mean>=0.2 AND >=2 eligible crossings), so the gate is not credited for admitting a non-explorer.

items.title: INV-074 crystallization-necessity: task-distribution-shift phase-3 redesign (supersedes 610f)
items.note: IGW-20260609-038 / failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-610f_2026-06-08 user-confirmed route (a). Replaces the noise-only phase-3 with a genuine TASK-DISTRIBUTION SHIFT (SD-054 reef-bipartite layout + hazard_food_attraction=0.8 -> flee-to-reef single dominant optimum conflicting with the phase-0-2 forage policy) so the un-crystallized control suffers catastrophic forgetting (D2 collapse) while the EWC-anchored arm resists (D1). reef_enabled in all phases keeps world_obs_dim=275 constant. Decisive substrate-incapacity fork pre-registered: if D2 still fails on a genuine task-shift -> accept INV-074 substrate_ceiling and STOP the 610 cascade. 5 arms x 3 seeds (42/43/44) x 2500 ep x 200 steps; verified wiring (_assert_fixes_wired) + D3 non-vacuity gate carried from 610f.

items.title: ARC-062 GAP-B rule-apprehension behavioural falsifier -- longer CRF maturation re-run of 654a
items.note: Longer-maturation re-run of V3-EXQ-654a (MECH-309 + ARC-062). 654a self-routed substrate_not_ready_requeue: crf_frac_active=0.137<0.30, 0/3 ON seeds matured even with crf_persist=True. ONLY change: maturation window P0+P1 100->240 ep (P0 60->150, P1 40->90) so the persisted CandidateRuleField clears the 0.3 C1c floor before scoring. Keeps crf_persist + within-arm rule_state counterfactual (recorded per seed) + C1c/C1d non-vacuity gate (self-routes non_contributory if maturation still fails). If matured-and-firing field STILL shows within-arm counterfactual ~0 + no committed-class lift, 654b joins the E3-commit-readout cluster (569f/661) confirming selection-authority coupling is the ceiling. Routed by failure_autopsy_569f-661-654a_2026-06-10.

items.title: Curriculum-trained affective fishtank showcase (scaffolded curriculum + harm-pathway; counterpart to V3-EXQ-664)
items.note: Diagnostic TELEMETRY showcase (claim_ids=[]); does NOT weight governance. The developmentally-scaffolded counterpart to V3-EXQ-664: trains the agent through the ScaffoldedSD054OnboardingScheduler curriculum (Stage-0/0b/P0/Stage-H/P1) WITH scaffold_train_harm_pathway ON, then runs an affective eval emitting the 664 affect schema for fishtank_viz.html. Dry-run smoke PASS: curriculum runs end-to-end, harm pathway trains (~180 steps), z_goal/wanting ACTIVE at eval (~0.39 vs 664's flat 0). PAG freeze motor-override disabled for the eval (the trained agent's chronic high z_harm_a otherwise freeze-locks it -- itself the z_harm_a-saturation story; affect telemetry stays faithful). MACHINE-PINNED to the Mac so the episode_log companion lands on origin (Phase-3 cloud workers strand episode_log side-files; see V3-EXQ-664).
